tweet.text:
Most AI biology models are trained on what humans have already published - that is useful.

However, the future of drug discovery is not just more data.

It is synthetic data.

But what happens when the target is novel?
What happens when the mechanism is under-published?
What happens when the best answer is not in PubMed yet?

That is why synthetic data matters.

With synthetic data, you can create hidden biological worlds.

You can define the real mechanism, the noise, the assay failure, the confounders, the false positives, the off-targets, the rare signals, and the true causal structure.

Then you test the model with good reasoning. 

The vision is simple:

AI will generate biological claims faster than humans can verify them. So the winning system is not just the one that generates the most ideas. It is the one that grades, tests, challenges, verifies, and learns from those ideas.

PeptideRX is building the full discovery loop:

BioLing - turns biological ideas into structured, evidence-graded claims instead of loose text.

ATL - the Autonomous Thesis Loop: models commit predictions before outcomes land, so discovery cannot be rewritten after the fact.

Helix Chain - the claim-state and verification layer where evidence, agents, challenges, and updates become replayable state.

Synthetic data discovery - hidden biological worlds for training and benchmarking reasoning models before wet lab cycles.

Wet lab - the proving ground where synthetic-world hypotheses meet real evidence.

PeptideRx - the system connecting all of it: synthetic world → BioLing claim → ATL prediction → wet lab evidence → Helix verification → oracle update → better discovery.

profile_bio.description: Pure Peptide. Research. Discovery. Enhancement.
